data.name: 潟湖茶座 : 噴泉奇譚
data.detailed_description:
Update to ver3.0.0 in 2024.01.27


・随着 Lagoon Lounge 2 的发布，UI 已经进行了更改，同时修复了一些问题。

故事

　
主角是一個積勞成疾，最後辭退工作的獸人。
身心俱疲的他為了休養，拜託了以前的好友幫忙搬家到一個湖邊的小村。

村莊裏頻頻發生伴隨巨響的神秘地震，村民都稱那現象為『春洲之巨人』。
在好奇的旅客蜂擁而至的那個村子，
主角作為一家餐廳的店員，與意氣相投的夥伴們一起工作。

就在如此的新生活中，他聽到了來自朋友的一個警告：
「絕對不可以靠近村中廣場的噴泉」
那噴泉，將會是個大大威脅他生活的危機。

遊戲內容

這是個有獸人角色登場，含有同性向元素的視覺小說遊戲。
遊戲系統重視操作便利及重玩性，
玩家可以經由章節列表重新選讀喜歡的章節，
以及重新選擇分支。

語言

此遊戲支援多種語言，
在遊戲中只需要一個按鈕就能隨時切換語言，
適合用作學習外語。

data.short_description: 這是個有獸人角色登場的同性向視覺小說遊戲。 玩家扮演即將搬到一個湖邊小村的獸人，與朋友們一起生活。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 日文, 韓文, 泰文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista, XP, 7, 10 (each 64bit only)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Lagoon Lounge : The Poisonous Fountain
data.detailed_description:
Update to ver3.0.0 in 2024.01.27


・In conjunction with the release of Lagoon Lounge 2, there have been changes to the UI, and several issues have been fixed.

Story

The protagonist is a furry who quit his job after a decline in his health due to overwork. Because of his exhaustion, his old friend takes him in at a seaside village to recover.


Lately, there have been loud rumblings accompanied by mysterious earthquakes in the village. This phenomenon has been named "The Giant of Harusu". In this village being flooded with curious tourists, the main character will work as a waiter at a restaurant alongside his friends.

The main character also receives a warning from one of his friends soon after moving in. "Don't go anywhere near the fountain in the village's plaza." He will soon come find out what kind of threat it poses.

Game Contents

This visual novel has furry characters and homosexual content. This game's system emphasizes convenience and replayability, so you can chose any episode from a list after reading and easily make different choices.

Languages

This game supports multiple languages. With the press of a key, you can switch languages anytime during gameplay. This is a great tool for learning a new language!

data.short_description: This is a visual novel containing furry characters and homosexual themes. You take on the role of a furry who has moved to a seaside village and become involved in the lives of its residents.
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Thai

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows Vista, XP, 7, 10 (each 64bit only)
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
